overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a red-haired character in dark robes walking across a wet cobblestone bridge toward a massive gothic castle at dusk. The character passes through a grand archway into an illuminated courtyard with towering spires and atmospheric storm clouds overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge leading to castle gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet cobblestone bridge toward the illuminated castle entrance

entered.detail: large gothic stone entrance with pointed arch and glowing windows above
low stone wall along the bridge edge
low stone wall along the bridge edge
tall pointed towers rising behind the main gate against stormy sky
black iron lamppost with warm yellow glow lining the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wet cobblestone bridge toward a massive gothic castle gate. Stone railings line both sides of the path while tall spires rise against a dark stormy sky, with warm lantern light illuminating the approach.

events.description: character enters the covered stone archway from the open bridge

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand stone archway tunnel toward the courtyard beyond

entered.detail: ornate carved stone tunnel with gothic ribbed vaulting
green glowing wall-mounted lantern with metal frame
intricate stone carvings and columns lining the archway interior

segments.scene_description: The character passes into a covered stone archway, transitioning from the open bridge to an enclosed tunnel. The space is dimly lit by green wall sconces with ornate carvings lining the walls as the character approaches the bright exit ahead.

events.description: character exits the archway into the open castle courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking across the expansive courtyard toward the main castle building facade

entered.detail: massive gothic facade with tall illuminated windows and multiple spires
trimmed green bushes along the courtyard edge
black iron lamppost with warm yellow glow lining the courtyard
black iron lamppost with warm yellow glow lining the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the character enters a vast open courtyard with the massive castle facade dominating the view. The building's windows glow warmly against the dark sky, while lanterns line the paved path and manicured hedges border the walkway.

events.description: character turns left to walk along the courtyard perimeter path

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking along the courtyard edge past a tiered stone fountain

entered.detail: multi-tiered circular stone fountain with water basin
large planter with pink blooming flowers
stone seating bench along the garden path

segments.scene_description: The character turns left along the courtyard perimeter, revealing a stone fountain on the left and garden benches with potted flowers on the right. The castle towers now flank the view as the character walks along the building's edge past the water feature.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked bridge into the heart of a sprawling gothic castle complex at dusk. It begins with the character traversing a wet cobblestone bridge flanked by stone railings, moving toward massive gates under a dark, stormy sky lit by warm lanterns. As the character advances, the open air gives way to a dimly lit stone archway where ornate carvings and green wall sconces line the tunnel before the path opens up again. The scene then expands into a vast courtyard dominated by the glowing windows of the castle facade and manicured hedges bordering the paved walkway. Finally, the camera turns left along the perimeter, gliding past a stone fountain and garden benches as the towering spires flank the view.
